title: Late-Breaking Study Results Reinforce Positive Real-World Outcomes with the WATCHMAN FLX™ LAAC Device
text: MARLBOROUGH, Mass., Feb. 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) today announced positive results from a new analysis assessing real-world outcomes with the WATCHMAN FLX™ Left Atrial Appendage Closure (LAAC) Device.

title: FTC approves modifications to Boston Scientific divestiture agreement
text: The U.S. Federal Trade Commission said it has approved certain modifications to medical device company Boston Scientific Corp's divestiture agreements.

title: Is Boston Scientific Stock A Good Buy At $43?
text: We believe that Boston Scientific stock is a good buying opportunity at the current levels. Earlier this month the company released its Q4 earnings, which were better than our estimates.

title: Boston Scientific Closes Acquisition of Baylis Medical Company Inc.
text: MARLBOROUGH, Mass., Feb. 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) today announced the close of its acquisition of Baylis Medical Company Inc., a company that offers advanced transseptal access solutions as well as guidewires, sheaths and dilators used to support catheter-based left-heart procedures.

title: Boston Scientific to Participate in 11th Annual SVB Leerink Global Healthcare Conference
text: MARLBOROUGH, Mass., Feb. 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) will participate in SVB Leerink's 11th Annual Global Healthcare Conference on Thursday, February 17, 2022.

title: Boston Scientific (BSX) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Boston Scientific (BSX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.27% and 0.91%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: BOSTON SCIENTIFIC ANNOUNCES RESULTS FOR FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL YEAR 2021
text: MARLBOROUGH, Mass., Feb. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) generated net sales of $3.127 billion during the fourth quarter of 2021, growing 15.4 percent on a reported basis, 16.9 percent on an operational1 basis and 15.1 percent on an organic2 basis, all compared to the prior year period.

title: Medical Products Stock Earnings on Feb 2: BSX, TMO & More
text: Medical Products companies' Q4 results are likely to reflect an increase in COVID-19 testing demand. Let's see how BSX, TMO, HOLX and MCK are poised ahead of their earnings releases.

title: What To Expect From Boston Scientific Stock Following Q4 Earnings?
text: Boston Scientific is scheduled to report its Q4 2021 results on Wednesday, Feb 2.
